name: Abhinav Gunnammagari
role: Associate Software Engineer (AI/ML) | AI/ML Engineer | Generative AI Enthusiast
summary: AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience building production-ready AI systems, RAG applications, AI governance platforms, and intelligent automation solutions. Passionate about Generative AI, AI Agents, LLMs, and scalable backend engineering, with a strong foundation in Data Engineering, Spark, and modern cloud technologies.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer (AI/ML)
description: Designed and developed enterprise AI Governance Platform modules including RBAC, GRC workflows, AI evaluation pipelines, and continuous AI asset monitoring.
Built an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using Milvus, Mistral, Ollama, and FastAPI that reduced duplicate support tickets by 37%.
Developed AI-powered workflow automation that converts workflow diagrams and voice inputs into executable JSON workflows using Google's Gemini Vision models.
Designed scalable ELT pipelines integrating enterprise data sources into Amazon S3 and Apache Iceberg using Airbyte, Meltano, DLTHub, Spark, and Airflow.
Worked on production AI applications involving LLMs, AI Agents, vector databases, REST APIs, Docker, and distributed data processing.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering
education.institution: Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology

projects.title: AI Governance Platform
description: Built enterprise AI Governance modules including Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Governance Review Control (GRC), AI asset discovery, and AI evaluation pipelines.
Developed automated AI asset monitoring across cloud environments with support for governance, security, and compliance workflows.

projects.title: RAG-Based Ticket Recommendation System
description: Developed an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline using Milvus vector database, Mistral LLM, Ollama embeddings, and FastAPI.
Reduced duplicate support tickets by 37% by recommending similar historical tickets with AI-powered semantic search.

projects.title: Theia AI - Image & Voice Workflow Automation
description: Built an AI system that converts hand-drawn workflows, Figma diagrams, and voice instructions into executable workflow JSON.
Integrated Gemini Vision APIs with an enterprise workflow engine for intelligent automation.

projects.title: COD Risk Scoring Agent
description: Designed an AI-powered risk scoring system predicting Cash-on-Delivery order returns using Bayesian modelling and customer behaviour analysis.
Generated explainable risk scores to support merchant decisions including prepaid conversion and verification workflows.

projects.title: Customer Feedback Automation System
description: Built an AI-powered feedback analysis system that classifies customer feedback, routes requests automatically, and drafts intelligent responses using LLMs.
